subcodes.first_line: O companions of this Wronged One! The honoured pilgrim, Áqá Muhammad-Hasan, hath arrived and for some days shall be an intimate companion in this gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران اینمظلوم جناب زائر آقا محمد حسن وارد و ایامی چند در این جمع همدم و
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @personal instructions, @exhortations and counsels, @being a source of light; guidance, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
